title: Knowledge is Power
body:
![Knowledge is Power](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c3ffbd3acbb1e24f0da7f1529a1cdba5a42e70a9.png)

## Description
*Knowledge is Power* is determined to give the player useful information without the use of the immersion-breaking F3 screen!

### Features:
- Additional tooltip information added to Compass, Clock, Recovery Compass, and Shulker Box
- A set of craftable items that give information to the player carrying them, including biome, block light, world age in days, and whether or not slimes can spawn in a given chunk
- In-game documentation is available via [Treatise](https://modrinth.com/mod/treatise) if installed
- In-game configuration is available via [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) if installed.

## Support
If you have a bug report, feature request, or any other type of issue, please post on our GitHub [issues page](https://github.com/DentedLeft/Dented-Modding/issues).  This is an issues page for all of our mods, so be sure to include the mod's name and version in your post.  We appreciate all feedback!

If you'd like to support development, you can leave a tip at our [BuyMeACoffee](https://buymeacoffee.com/dentedleft).  Only if it's within your means- otherwise, using, sharing, and enjoying the mod is support enough.  Thank you!

Lunar Clock textures derived from [Urkaz Moon Tools](https://modrinth.com/mod/urkaz-moon-tools), used under the LGPL-3.0-or-later license.
